public_reputation: Keeper of controlled inks, copying standards, and preservation practice in Bookhaven.
manner: Carries the habits of a inkmaster whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Bookhaven.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of inkmaster in and around Bookhaven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Bookhaven workable through the obligations of inkmaster while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of inkmaster credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Bookhaven.

adventure_hooks.summary: Inkmaster Sera Pellin can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Bookhaven.
Inkmaster Sera Pellin becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a inkmaster.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Inkmaster Sera Pellin is readable as a inkmaster tied to Bookhaven.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Bookhaven: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Inkmaster Sera Pellin presents as someone shaped by the duties of a inkmaster and the daily pressures of Bookhaven.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a inkmaster, and proof that strangers will not make Bookhaven harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Inkmaster Sera Pellin refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a inkmaster too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Inkmaster Sera Pellin can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Inkmaster Sera Pellin adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Inkmaster Sera Pellin always knows more about Bookhaven than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to inkmaster duties in Bookhaven.
